recommendations: optimistic_edit_without_read regression is the highest-priority signal this cycle — it had shown two consecutive clean cycles suggesting improvement, but has reverted to baseline; the two instances (plan.md and file-select.v2.tsx) both follow the identical pattern of attempting an Edit without a fresh Read immediately before it; a PreToolUse hook that requires a recent Read on the same target file before any Edit would mechanically prevent this; this is the one bias where the trend data suggests intervention could have durable effect
